subject: We need real change...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Leah for Senate
body:
This whole year has been filled with disappointing inaction and incompetence. It’s ridiculous. And it needs to change. But the only way to really....

Friend, need a perfect example of everything wrong with Washington? Look no further than the Senate.

Remember when we the people voted to repeal Obamacare?
❌ The Senate failed to make that happen.

Or when we voted for a secure border?
❌ The Senate has failed to make that happen.

What about larger immigration reform?
❌ Big fat NO action from the Senate there, too.

And who even knows what will happen with tax reform!

If we’re being honest, we don’t even expect our senators to get their jobs done at this point. This whole year has been filled with disappointing inaction and incompetence. It’s ridiculous.

And it needs to change. But the only way to really change Washington is to replace our lazy politicians with some new faces. That’s why I’m running for Senate and that’s why the Washington elite will do everything they can to stop me.

But Friend, with you by my side I’m confident we can defeat them. That moment got me started on my mission to expand opportunities for education across Wisconsin, but we have a whole lot further to go. name: The White House
subject: Democrats supported tax reform before they opposed it
body:
1600 Daily
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=37b270fb3b4ecb831746aa44b93438bcf5e4d9410d8ac23b2225d22d1a06501ca87350274756fe3df69ef166102d0413da4a7f5881bd7dd1

Democrats supported tax reform before they opposed it

Republican National Committee Chairwoman Ronna McDaniel took aim at Democrats yesterday for their opposition to the Tax Cuts and Jobs Act currently making its way through Congress.

“Democrats in Congress vowing to oppose the bill should remember what they themselves once supported,” writes McDaniel in the Washington Examiner. She offers a pretty good list:

- Senate Minority Leader Chuck Schumer (D-NY)
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=37b270fb3b4ecb831e1741edbaea30ac0688b9c059539ee5ba31ed5a3af6df114838a9607de5163d84a72638583d6e4973a2ab4b0ae72b75
said last year he favored cutting the corporate tax rate to make U.S. businesses competitive worldwide.
- House Minority Leader Nancy Pelosi was
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=37b270fb3b4ecb83a82bda72acbb7891b3412335d4f9723a8a0e763c096793f5b53783ce57a871c8f904f5e808360041e93439653d153d65
on the same page : “It is long past time for tax reform that would lower the corporate rate.”
- Expanding the child tax credit? Former Sen. Tom Daschle and Pelosi
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=37b270fb3b4ecb83002d20c7c9e2238fb818767d5eb0d7ff0ad34cfe84b5ea1f8f0b984bac2abeef8f26858f0afa92c24f03adfe903f83b1
called on President Bush to do just that in 2003.
- How about axing the Alternative Minimum Tax? None other than Sen. Bernie Sanders (I-VT)
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=37b270fb3b4ecb832a636e7b9784e5dd140f659efb1bda3a8ae07861ba76c24d5219faba2c04ad080f2d8d2e53cc5a2142f60d0929e5a2be
wanted to replace it with a simpler flat rate during his presidential run.

The bottom line? Passing any major legislation is difficult – it requires genuine compromise and sacrifice. But the Tax Cuts and Jobs Act is a good-faith effort to give middle- and working-class families a boost. Now, says McDaniel, Democrats “are nowhere to be found.”

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=37b270fb3b4ecb83a265c44d1c2c427fe55e1f9302c0233a88a8d30fa97bab1acd931e03130ca5881049966dd9e034a0feaab2be6a7aaf4a
Read more of McDaniel’s op-ed here.

President Trump talks taxes in Missouri

President Donald J. Trump traveled yesterday to St. Charles, Missouri, to speak about the crucial need to pass tax reform. The President emphasized the crippling effects of overtaxation on small businesses and pushed for reform that will “usher in a thrilling new era of opportunity and growth for this Nation.”

The proposed Republican plan is the most ambitious in decades: It cuts taxes for middle-income families, doubles the amount of income that’s taxed at a rate of zero, and expands the child tax credit. It also provides relief from the estate tax and sharply reduces the corporate rate from 35 percent to 20 percent. Still not enough? How about a one-time bargain rate on corporate earnings brought home that will flood trillions of dollars back into the U.S. economy.

“This is the right plan; this is the right time,” concluded President Trump. “This is good for the country, and that’s ultimately what it’s all about.”

Watch the President’s full remarks
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=37b270fb3b4ecb83da4f66643198abc4f9332b3a73594021fc1a7a62fca2bef9283bfc053850ac422a27b221173b6826364c6da37efed1aa
here and learn more about his
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=37b270fb3b4ecb83a26d23b1398da0974018355ea610fae6cfff68c4e74c933c291f7e724ab079af77118a086644f3b56bcc5c3f3eb632e0
goals for tax reform.

Taking action on North Korea

Yesterday President Trump spoke with Chinese President Xi Jinping following North Korea's missile launch this week. President Trump emphasized the pressing need for China to use all available levers to convince North Korea to end its provocations and return to the path of denuclearization.

Yesterday’s call follows one between President Trump and South Korean President Moon Jae-In on Tuesday. Both leaders underscored the grave threat that North Korea’s latest provocation poses not only to the United States and the Republic of Korea, but to the entire world. Such tests only serve to undermine North Korea’s security and deepen its diplomatic and economic isolation.

View the readouts of President Trump’s call with President Xi Jinping
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=37b270fb3b4ecb83f81e9f04e75f6a34e79ccd3d2fec8db394c562a04fa82db1aaf51cb58a2e9b45606d37f3dca82ba4cae9c5db41f1c96a
here and President Moon Jae-In
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=37b270fb3b4ecb838eaedafd562fac01938dd7a58f51a0251f6bcbcf93af5e35ad9d45ba52aba8e6487e82adfb228a96025f3c8967096140
here.

Photo of the Day

President Donald J. Trump visits Missouri to deliver remarks on tax reform | November 29, 2017 (Official White House Photo by Joyce N. Boghosian)

POTUS TODAY

Today, President Trump will meet with the Crown Prince of Bahrain at the White House.

Tonight, the President and First Lady Melania Trump will participate in the National Christmas Tree Lighting at the White House – carrying on a 95-year tradition with special musical performers and Christmas festivities.
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=37b270fb3b4ecb837f85f399a19e6f71194eaee9e72b316a0b8fcda6cb0ab954d0103c7951163dd99f3ac2e8cc63b2fd0a6bf74839392d97
Watch LIVE at 5pm ET.

COMING UP

Tomorrow, President Trump will meet with the Prime Minister of Libya to discuss bilateral engagement between the two countries and reaffirm America’s support for Libya’s unity government.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=37b270fb3b4ecb83714d698af0641b7ce136405323da7c6f7d20f3321cd2a6a40699b907a36f902a3a60425cc705e15e2739d3f6cc71d161
Privacy Policy |

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=37b270fb3b4ecb83df89eebf8eca57e69119b3a0c2d455e42f37429ea0a49e74e23eb64302e501021be45423b064486fd4d61b0c4a73e54b
Contact the White House |

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/unsub_center.aspx?qs=d453c42a6560d1d4a3c440dba45f602c1b43073899379a5b4c6e5a019e693bf348a250ff7674b83fe77e690d1cfcd259c92709cfce913f82
Unsubscribe

body:

Friend,

Right now, Republicans are pushing a tax plan through Congress that
showers benefits onto the mega-rich at the expense of ordinary working
Americans. And why wouldn’t they?

Thanks to policies like opaque campaign finance laws and hyperpartisan
gerrymandering that have undermined our democratic legitimacy,
Republicans have every incentive to represent the interests of the
wealthy few, at the expense of the vast majority of Americans.

Fighting for America’s democratic legitimacy has never been more
crucial than it is right now -- and LegitAction is the only
organization in the country solely dedicated to this cause.

With this month’s financial deadline coming up tonight at midnight and
our ability to keep doing this work on the line, we’re still $6,480
away from hitting our goal.

[ https://act.legitaction.com/go/2396?t=1002&akid=431%2E356062%2E3-t9WE ]Help meet LegitAction’s November financial goal before the clock
runs out. We just need another $6,480 by midnight tonight. Make a
contribution of $3 today.

Legit members are actively working for reforms like automatic voter
registration and greater transparency in campaign finance. And

stepping up.

Thank you for standing up for democratic legitimacy today,

What are the [issues](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=0a057f7923b34ffa94ea7d9504a488ff&_e=PHdk77pw4kCDC7giIRC9iFYuxt4a0Ny4BMNGuLZZsappkGIr2zwciJ3YFeCZ3Q8YZxwF0nxqPUuVyHeQlF0-54kEyir43O5T7wBi6rBduacqWRZR7F8Z_omCNVBCQ7-1rJOHfRe-5Wu4bUCCiuE57B_Rw1r-7Pli2hBQs4I77LGs-kvi_6vRWpu8uv4pG8lV0c_0gipmxW4AZOymIAo_CCCB8fC5OlplctyVO4395zb1uFm0Y186WJ2taVA2AbaueMCxY90Y20X52JSTVU0fIAmy7fhmlYG45ve7vNXp571Js4lzXl7Wl5bHEiSHHNIMDjYJUcpAcYg-xuIjZLbf6zrcl8qXtK3WiS1kfh-nSjH-JlTiN82450yfnY15NpXD) that you care about? If the past few years have taught me anything, it’s that if you want to make change, you have to stand up and lead. So I’m asking you, to [stand up](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=0a057f7923b34ffa94ea7d9504a488ff&_e=PHdk77pw4kCDC7giIRC9iFYuxt4a0Ny4BMNGuLZZsarcoBzmjOmBoBThZ8McrXkfO1iwKF5AOh7hnVsO4KzBZTm4Q5XY-wSPC9HVk6UyzZzHULsGSGsFn5DKBRKL0NDwpI-kyxUz1aK6jqvSNwbmbbQ4Jy3fmfY8w9OvyV5DnfSPmEbJDKbW6KWf2OLYHLhoRIUYOv-hK8P8izV8izqGwkcbkIgzG2W35nzTINLxknRn5ZNMKUmKNoVqwNvRVs2HFXa4b5noR4-ehivPQ_EkgJibhGftIUMyL8PLILH02vccJ61I5agMxptK_0wWXeMttqOE9Xmf2C8LZNT4R0-4BV3h2eZ3cCWueL9gvHh3pbf_EUgFRLY1sztcTaxT3-qz) to help me take the Wisconsin way to Washington. clean_body: We’ve got less than 24 hours to meet our fundraising goal and I’m counting on you to get us through! We just need 9 more donors to reach our goal! Ca Friend, I’ll make this quick. We’ve got less than 24 hours to meet our fundraising goal and I’m counting on you to get us through! We just need 9 more donors to reach our goal! I can’t tell you how much it would mean to me to be able to send a bold, strong message to the dysfunctional elites that we will not tolerate their failures any longer. Let’s show Washington the Wisconsin Way by making this a successful end to the quarter and continuing strong into the rest of the year. Leah \----- Forwarded Message below \----- Friend, need a perfect example of everything wrong with Washington? Look no further than the Senate. Remember when we the people voted to repeal Obamacare? ❌ The Senate failed to make that happen. Or when we voted for a secure border? ❌ The Senate has failed to make that happen. What about larger immigration reform? ❌ Big fat NO action from the Senate there, too. And who even knows what will happen with tax reform! If we’re being honest, we don’t even expect our senators to get their jobs done at this point. This whole year has been filled with disappointing inaction and incompetence. It’s ridiculous. And it needs to change. But the only way to really change Washington is to replace our lazy politicians with some new faces. That’s why I’m running for Senate and that’s why the Washington elite will do everything they can to stop me. But Friend, with you by my side I’m confident we can defeat them. We’re just hours away from a very important fundraising deadline and I need 29 more donors in your area. Friend, this race is going to be a tough one. The status quo never likes a shake up. But a shake up is exactly what the Senate needs. Please, help me bring conservative change to the Swamp and get Washington working for you again. Donate here in the next few hours to make a huge difference: Thank you, Friend. Leah Paid for by Leah for Senate

name: Nina Turner, Our Revolution
subject: Time is Running Out for the Clean Dream Act
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
body:
The Senate has a chance right now to protect the future of 800,000 Dreamers
#
Friends,
The Senate has a chance right now to protect the future of 800,000 Dreamers. The Deferred Action for Childhood Arrivals (DACA) program has provided Dreamers, people brought to this country as children, the opportunity to come out of the shadows and pursue the American dream.
Every person dreams of a better future for themselves, for their families, and for their country. DACA recipients deserve the ability to dream of a better future too. I will not stop fighting until there is a legislative solution that provides permanent status.
[**Will you join me and take action today? Call your Senators and tell them to pledge to vote against any year-end spending bill unless it includes a clean Dream Act.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7ae35/bed43eb/28cd4adc/75ff6fa1/3814273041/VEsH/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/content/defend-daca/?source=em171130")
On September 5, President Trump repealed DACA, putting thousands of young undocumented immigrants at risk of deportation. If Trump is successful, these young people will be taken away from the only country they've called home and the dream that they have pursued will be taken away. Passing a clean Dream Act is a step forward for our country, anything short of that will take us backward. DACA recipients are ingrained in our communities--they are our friends, our neighbors, and our fellow Americans.
[**We must push our Senators to include the clean Dream Act in the omnibus spending bill, which is expected to be voted on December 8. Will you call your Senators today?**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7ae35/bed43eb/28cd4adc/75ff6fa1/3814273041/VEsE/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/content/defend-daca/?source=em171130")
Dr. Martin Luther King Jr. once said: "Whatever affects one directly, affects all indirectly." I carry this quote with me in the fight for Dreamers. Every single person deserves the opportunity to pursue their dream, regardless of their skin color, their gender, or where they were born.
**Today I am calling on you to join us as we stand with the Dreamers.**
[**Call your Senators today.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7ae35/bed43eb/28cd4adc/75ff6fa1/3814273041/VEsF/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/content/defend-daca/?source=em171130")
In solidarity,
Nina Turner
President
Our Revolution
**[CALL 844-847-3222»](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7ae35/bed43eb/28cd4adc/75ff6fa1/3814273041/VEsC/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/content/defend-daca/?source=em171130")**

name: Democrats.org
subject: These numbers don't lie, Derek
body:
Chip in before our November deadline to help elect Democrats
---
**Our end-of-month deadline is tonight -- pitch in $10 or more before midnight to help elect Democrats.

** **[DONATE](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523f5d/4067b0a/4c627ba1e/7e5b3d25/416133574/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/November-2017-Deadline1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=em_20171130_joc_v1s2&source=em_20171130_joc_v1s2&refcode=em_20171130_joc_v1s2")**
Let's talk numbers, Derek. On the ballot in 2018 there are:

* 435 House seats

* 6 governors' offices
* 34 Senate seats
* and countless local seats

That might seem like a lot of races, but I see them as opportunities -- opportunities to put Democrats in office who are going to fight for the values you and I believe in.

2018 is right around the corner. If we're going to win up and down the ballot, we need supporters like you to step up -- and there's no better time than now. Chip in $10 or more before our November deadline and let's get to work turning more seats blue.

**If you've saved your payment information, your donation will go through immediately.
